storyboard.content: I get crushing chest pain in the center of my chest that spreads to my left arm and jaw when I'm active
I get really short of breath and sweaty whenever the chest pain comes on
Last night the pain woke me up from sleep and lasted longer than it usually does
This started about three weeks ago and it has been happening more often and lasting longer each time
The pain comes on when I walk up stairs or do yard work, but it goes away if I stop and rest for a few minutes
The pain gets to about a 7 out of 10 and is really cutting back on what I can do day to day
I'm a 58-year-old man, I'm overweight, and I smoke
